heading: Incorporation by reference
label: 302 Incorporation by reference
text: Sections 202, 203, 204, 205, and 207 of this title shall apply to this chapter as if specifically set forth herein, except that for the purposes of this chapter “the Convention” shall mean the Inter-American Convention.
notes: Effective DateSection effective upon the entry into force of the Inter-American Convention on International Commercial Arbitration of , with respect to the United States (), see , set out as a note under .January 30, 1975Oct. 27, 1990section 3 of Pub. L. 101–369section 301 of this title
